_comment: Declarative project registry. Authored from observed evidence (git remotes + corpus tokens). v2 fields (entity_type/owner_id/parent_id/reuse_scope/lineage) added per ADR-0001, ADDITIVELY: project_id/aliases/repos of existing entries are unchanged, so scope resolution and the no-loss gate are unaffected. reuse_scope is a REUSE classification, NOT access control / authZ. organization and source_lineage entries are addressable for reporting but are excluded from the alias/repo indexes (never a project a neuron resolves to). Paperclip is a legacy external orchestrator (source_lineage), never a project_id. Wired into live MCP scope resolution since PR-3C-e: canonicalProject/isGlobalScope resolve registry → external file → seed, with the seed fallback intact (a missing/invalid registry degrades cleanly). Review/edit by PR.

repos.note: bare mirror of the app repo

projects.note: 509 corpus neurons; client (cliente+socio) operated through FactoryOS

repos.note: distinct GitHub repo (ASINOSE12345/PeopleSynapse-v1), superseded by v2. Folded here (PR-3C): no v1-specific corpus tokens, so not a separate project.

projects.note: in-house SaaS, but for FactoryOS it operates as a tenant/work context — modeled as client, not organization

repos.note: second local checkout of the SAME GitHub repo (branch docs/progress-map)

projects.note: FactoryOS runtime; replaced the Paperclip orchestrator (lineage)

repos.note: separate GitHub repo; web component of the same product

projects.note: internal product/context/repo (core + web). NOT the parent company. Paperclip lineage = multi-agent spike.
Factory / platform. Kept conservative: NOT split into Factory Memory / Factory Skills entries in this PR (would move repos and risk the gate). is_global preserved.
JB Coding IoT — parent company / owner. Id deliberately distinct from the 'jbcodingiot' product token. Excluded from the alias index (a container, not a neuron's project).
legacy external orchestrator (paperclipai). Source lineage only — NEVER a resolvable project_id. Excluded from the alias index. Knowledge lives under jbcodingiot with paperclip lineage/domain/tags.
